message:
test(pattern-learning): implement test_mixed_actions_prefer_broad

Implements the stubbed test that verifies pattern learner
correctly prefers Broad specificity level when user actions
are inconsistent (< 80% agreement between kills and spares).

This validates the action consistency threshold logic in
select_best_candidate().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
